items.title: Former Chelsea star behind famous goal lands brand new role as replacement for chief who ditched club for fierce rivals
items.summary: FORMER Chelsea striker Demba Ba has landed a major new role after being appointed sporting director of Le Havre. The Ligue 1 club confirmed the ex-Blues forward's arrival on Friday following the departure of Mathieu Bodmer. Bodmer stepped down after four years in the position amid reported tensions

items.title: France World Cup stars seen heading to Shake Shack burger bar as Didier Deschamps plans to axe THREE aces from side
items.summary: FRENCH aces Desire Doue, Bradley Barcola and Malo Gusto snuck out of their World Cup base - to head to a Boston burger bar. Coach Didier Deschamps gave the green light for the trio to forgo their five-star luxury at the Four Seasons Hotel in the middle of Boston. Instead they headed six blocks down.

items.summary: THE Netherlands are gearing up for a mouth-watering Group F showdown against Sweden, but Ronald Koeman’s Oranje machine is missing one of its most vital components. items.title: Former Arsenal star ‘lined up for stunning Premier League return with London rivals keen on transfer’
items.summary: FORMER Arsenal full-back Ainsley Maitland-Niles has emerged as a target for Crystal Palace, according to reports. items.title: Boston bounce sends Scotland to Miami with hope and no fear
items.summary: Scotland and their fans head to Miami for a World Cup date with destiny after making memories in Boston to last a lifetime.

items.title: Down but not out: Socceroos take heart from positives in defeat to USA | Jack Snape
items.summary: Australia’s fate will be set after their final group game against Paraguay but there were some reasons for cheer from the performance in Seattle The Socceroos are down, but they are not out. items.title: England’s World Cup base hit with TORNADO warning with local weather reports forecasting severe storm
items.summary: ENGLAND'S World Cup preparations have been thrown into fresh chaos after weather experts warned a possible tornado could hit their Kansas City training base on Saturday. The Three Lions are currently based at Swope Soccer Village, where they are fine-tuning preparations for their World Cup campaign

items.title: Mauricio Pochettino interrupted during live Fox interview after USA fans go wild following Australia World Cup win
items.summary: MAURICIO Pochettino was interrupted by USA fans during a live Fox interview. The USA coach had to deal with fans going wild after defeating Australia at the 2026 World Cup. Pochettino, 54, was caught out by fans screaming his name after guiding the USA to another win. His side dominated the Socceroo
